headline.title: Anthropic says Claude Code subscribers will need to pay extra for OpenClaw usage
headline.summary: It’s about to become more expensive for Claude Code subscribers to use Anthropic’s coding assistant with OpenClaw and other third-party tools.

In January, folk artist Murphy Campbell discovered several songs on her Spotify profile that did not belong there. They were songs
tools.content:
Murphy Campbell is at the center of a brewing storm around AI and a broken copyright system. | Image: Murphy Campbell	

In January, folk artist Murphy Campbell discovered several songs on her Spotify profile that did not belong there. They were songs that she had recorded, but she'd never uploaded them to Spotify, and something was off about the vocals.
She quickly surmised that someone had pulled performances of the songs she posted to YouTube, created AI covers, and uploaded them to streaming

tools.title: Really, you made this without AI? Prove it
tools.summary:
"This looks like AI."
It's a phrase I dread seeing as a writer who dabbles in illustration and amateur photography. In a world where generative AI technology is increasingly adept at mimicking the work of humans, people are naturally skeptical when o
tools.content:
"This looks like AI."
It's a phrase I dread seeing as a writer who dabbles in illustration and amateur photography. In a world where generative AI technology is increasingly adept at mimicking the work of humans, people are naturally skeptical when online platforms refuse to label even obvious AI content.
This leads me to one conclusion: maybe we should start labeling human-made text, images, audio, and video with something akin to a universally recognized Fair Trade logo. The machines sure as h

tools.title: Anthropic essentially bans OpenClaw from Claude by making subscribers pay extra
tools.summary: Using OpenClaw with Claude AI is about to get a lot more expensive, thanks to Anthropic's new policy changes. Beginning April 4th at 3PM ET, users will "no longer be able to use your Claude subscription limits for third-party harnesses including Open
tools.content:
Using OpenClaw with Claude AI is about to get a lot more expensive, thanks to Anthropic's new policy changes. Beginning April 4th at 3PM ET, users will "no longer be able to use your Claude subscription limits for third-party harnesses including OpenClaw," according to an email sent to users on Friday evening. Instead, if users want to use OpenClaw with Claude, they'll have to use a "pay-as-you-go option" that will be billed separate from their Claude subscription.

culture.title: ‘Occasionally a picture can change the course of history’: 33 scandalous photos that shocked the world
culture.summary:
When it comes to scandal, seeing is believing – which is why these images caused such a stir
Words can tell a story, but it’s pictures that will make you believe in it. Such is the power of a photograph; the ability to strip away illusions, to illumi
culture.content:
When it comes to scandal, seeing is believing – which is why these images caused such a stir
Words can tell a story, but it’s pictures that will make you believe in it. Such is the power of a photograph; the ability to strip away illusions, to illuminate something hidden, and sometimes force us to accept unpalatable truths. When it comes to scandal, seeing is believing – occasionally even to the point that a picture changes the course of history.
